rules.rule_text:
rule monitor_tool_pos
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		reference = "POS malware - Monitoring Tool??"

	strings:
		$s1 = "RCPT TO"
		$s2 = "MAIL FROM"
		$s3 = "AUTH LOGIN"
		$s4 = "Reply-To"
		$s5 = "X-Mailer"
		$s6 = "crypto"
		$s7 = "test335.txt" wide
		$s8 = "/c del"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and 7 of ( $s* )
}
